caption: 周三的 crit,我守着圆角。
scene: Sage seated at a small table facing a single laptop showing a rounded-rectangle button shape on screen, one paw pointing firmly at the corner of the button, a tiny tilted pointer-hand cursor floating in from the right, his mouth a flat patient line
bible_hook: §2 Sage's design crit on Wednesday — defends a button radius like it's a moral position
rationale: Recent posts skewed to Andy's store work and domestic scenes; this swings to Sage's actual design-job pressure (crit + button radius) with no repeated motif.
